about.hero.title: Innovate for a sustainable future.
about.hero.description: Octara was born from a simple vision: to transform technology and make it accessible to everyone.
about.history.title: Our story
about.history.paragraph1: Founded in 2023 under the name LMC Group, Octara started as a help community for IT assistance. Our initial goal was to support new developers in their projects.
about.history.paragraph2: Over the years, we grew by creating LMC Bot which expanded our community, and then diversified by branching into other domains.
about.mission.title: Our mission
about.mission.description: Make computing accessible to all, without barriers, while respecting privacy.
about.values.title: Our values
about.values.integrity.title: Integrity
about.values.integrity.description: We act with transparency and honesty in every project we deliver.
about.values.innovation.title: Innovation
about.values.opensource.title: Open Source
about.values.opensource.description: We strive to promote and contribute to the development of open source software.
about.values.impact.title: Impact
about.values.impact.description: Every project should contribute positively to society.
about.cta.title: Ready to shape the future with us?
about.cta.description: We are always looking for passionate talent to join our journey and push boundaries.
